title: vibrant animations
description: tries to recreate actions and stuff AND vibrant visuals in one modpack!
body:
this modpack tries to make minecraft look as beautiful as possible for screenshots, not realistic

it uses bsl as the shaders and has some resource packs


<details>
<summary>resource packs</summary>

[fresh animations
](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

[barebones (disabled)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)

[enhanced boss bars (disabled)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars)

[fresh animations extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)

[barebones x fresh animations (disabled)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations)

[detailed animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations)

[3d crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops)

[fresh music discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-music-discs)

[fresh buckets (disabled because buggy with hmi)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-buckets)

[fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous) (disabled by default due to not working with shaders, if you cant run shaders, then please enable this for it to still look good)

I may have missed some, because prism launcher doesnt have the feature to export resource pack list.

</details>



<details>
<summary>mods</summary>
  
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) [3\.0\.6\+mc1\.21\.5] by squeek502 (appleskin\-fabric\-mc1\.21\.5\-3\.0\.6\.jar)
- [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/5srFLIaK) [1\.9\.4\-beta\+1\.21\.5\-fabric\.rev\.9981bdf] by Qendolin (better\-clouds\-1\.9\.4\-beta\+1\.21\.5\-fabric\.rev\.9981bdf\.jar)

<details>
<summary>Cool features</summary>

- joinable by your friends with e4mc, even if your friends arent running the modpack
![Image](https://i.imgur.com/o6oFyy0.png)
- create AMAZING screenshots
![screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/tNGucF2.jpeg)
- super cool animations
- very very amazing shaders
- and some more things!

</details>




the modpack may still be buggy because its in beta.
